main_event: Crescent-shaped object glowing like a comet flew east to west over Hawaiian Islands at high altitude, leaving vapor trail, seen by ANG pilots and hundreds of civilians.
sighted_object: Object glowing like a giant comet or spotlight; crescent moon-shaped; left vapor trail lighter than that from jet
witness_description: ANG pilots Capt. Jon Parish and Lt. George Joy flying at 40,000ft; FAA control-tower operators; WX observer; hundreds of Hawaiian civilians
interesting_points: Trail lighter than that from jet
Missile launched from Vandenberg confirmed by contact with Range Officer in telephone conversation
Capt Parish: 'It was possibly a rocket or some sort of space object'
Lt George Joy: UFO left a visible vapor trail lighter than a jet's
FAA spokesman: 'It was no aircraft, and I know no one who knows what it was'
Some observers said it appeared to be on fire and appeared to fall into the sea
